objective: Make new orchestration-bootstrap tasks reject status-agent-rollup evidence commands unless they include the current orchestration task readiness flag, so newly created orchestration tasks cannot confuse green agent rollup with launch readiness.

excluded: files and systems outside the declared allowed files

packets.objective: orchestration-bootstrap accepts trace evidence and status evidence with current-task readiness, rejects status evidence without the readiness flag, and focused/full validation pass

budgets.context: Bounded to taskboard, docs, task, workflow, and evidence files.
budgets.validation: Focused tests plus taskboard validation and strict status evidence.

integration.policy: Lead integrates subagent findings, updates packet statuses before closeout, and keeps manifest refs tied to the machine evidence artifact.
